newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Prior incremental items (OmniMax synergies, conference appearances) are residential roofing/building-products driven and orthogonal to the strict latent screen's facility-component repurposing thesis. Price drift (+2.0%) is immaterial.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent lens: nothing since June 9 strengthens or weakens the AI-node pathway. Gibraltar's renewables/infrastructure/building products show no evidence of repurposing into compute-facility components. Prior hold stands; YTD -20% drawdown is a separate price input.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Infrastructure/renewable products repurposed into non-obvious facility components
verdicts.primaryRisk: Core demand is residential/roofing/solar racking, unrelated to AI compute sites
verdicts.bull: Diversified infrastructure/renewables maker with optional fit for data-center facility hardware.
verdicts.neutral: No AI-node evidence; building-products cyclical with weak YTD.
verdicts.bear: Residential roofing/solar exposure with -20% YTD; latent-AI tie is purely hypothetical.
